---
title: Quarto Dashboards
subtitle: Lecture 20
format: revealjs
filters: 
  - ../remove-fmt-skip.lua
---

# Warm up

## Announcements {.smaller}

Project 2 presentations:

- 12: I prefer Thursday, April 23 (reading day 1) during my usual lab time.

- 10: I prefer Friday, April 24 (reading day 2) during my usual lab time.

- 27: Either Thursday, April 23 (reading day 1) or Friday, April 24 (reading day 2) during my usual lab time works for me, I just don't want them to be during the scheduled final exam time.

## Setup {.smaller}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
# load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(ggtext)
library(glue)

# set theme for ggplot2
ggplot2::theme_set(ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 16))

# set figure parameters for knitr
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 7, # 7" width
  fig.asp = 0.618, # the golden ratio
  fig.retina = 3, # dpi multiplier for displaying HTML output on retina
  fig.align = "center", # center align figures
  dpi = 300 # higher dpi, sharper image
)
```

# Let's make a Quarto dashboard

## `ae-14` - Step 1

::: task
- Review dashboard layout components.
- Add values to valueboxes.
- Create cards automatically and manually.
:::

## `ae-14` - Step 2

::: task
Add interactivity to your dashboard with Shiny inputs and outputs.
:::

## Learn more

<https://quarto.org/docs/dashboards>

```{=html}
<iframe width="1000" height="400" src="https://quarto.org/docs/dashboards" frameborder="1" style="background:white;"></iframe>
```
